prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021年第30名持续上升至2026年第24名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+等7个A-及以上学科，农林学科实力全国顶尖， 对相关专业报考有持续吸引力；2024年声誉评价为明显负面，考生反映招生电话难打通、专业设置不合理致投档线暴跌500名；但2025年位次已回升至14233，负面冲击基本消化；抖音热度排名第13（高热 ），食堂话题正面曝光度高，对报考有积极拉动。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，农学类相关专业热度一般；本省2026年物理类考生 约34.7万人，较2025年32万人增加约8.4%，竞争加剧；中国农业大学位于北京，对湖南考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在本 省物理类招生占比约2.5%（2025年87人/全国总计划），属中等偏低，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准14233名、2026年小幅扩招2人（位次数字增大）、本 省物理类考生增加8.4%（竞争加剧）、软科排名上升至第24名（吸引力增强）、抖音高热正面曝光等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在14233基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约1 4629名，区间14129–15129名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13694 → 11950 → 16787 → 15383 → 14233. In recent three years, it fluctuated significantly, with a sharp drop to 16787 in 2023 before recovering to 14233 in 2025, showing an overall oscillating pattern. The baseline for 2025 is about 14233. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 83 in 2021, 87 in 2022, 87 in 2023, 85 in 2024, and 87 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 89, a slight expansion of 2 students (+2.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but with limited effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it rose from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, reflecting steady improvement in comprehensive strength. It has 7 A- or above disciplines including Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, and Food Science and Engineering A+, with top-tier agricultural and forestry disciplines that maintain strong appeal for related majors. In 2024, reputation was notably negative, with candidates reporting hard-to-reach admissions hotlines and unreasonable major settings causing a 500-rank drop in admission scores. However, by 2025 the ranking recovered to 14233, indicating the negative impact has largely been absorbed. Douyin popularity ranks 13th (high heat), with positive exposure from cafeteria topics, actively boosting application interest.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, while agricultural majors have average popularity. In 2026, the provincial Physics Category examinee count is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Hunan candidates. The university's Physics Category enrollment in this province accounts for about 2.5% (87 in 2025 out of total national plan), which is moderately low, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 14233, a slight expansion of 2 students in 2026 (ranking number increases), an 8.4% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (intensified competition), a rise to 24th on the Soft Science ranking (enhanced appeal), and high positive exposure on Douyin, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to shift slightly downward from 14233. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14629, with a range of 14129–15129.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 14129–15129, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<14129), you can focus on competitive majors like Science Experimental Classes and Computer Class. If your ranking is near the upper bound (>15129), it is advisable to use Tier 3 Yantai Research Institute majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors such as Agronomy and Veterinary Medicine, which are strong disciplines of China Agricultural University.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2054 → 2182 → 2546 → 2624 → 2860, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 806 places, showing a continuous cooling trend; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2860; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 40 in 2025 (significant expansion); the 2026 plan is 39, a reduction of 1 (-2.5%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.
3. [School Level] 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking rose steadily from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2024, the reputation evaluation was clearly negative (poor admissions communication), but the ranking still shifted backward in 2025, with the negative impact persisting; Douyin popularity ranking 13th (high heat), positive exposure from cafeteria topics, positively influencing applications but History Category candidates have relatively low attention; Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, etc., but History Category majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Communication, etc.) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines, limited disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are socially hot and recommended, Economics category is differentiated and wait-and-see; the province's 2026 History Category candidates are approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31.7% from 142,000 in 2025, markedly intensifying competition.
7. [Regional Factors] China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hunan History Category candidates; its provincial History Category enrollment accounts for about 0.9% (40 in 2025 / total national plan), a very low proportion, with limited enrollment slots.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 2860, the continuous 5-year backward trend in History Category, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 1 (ranking number decreases), the significant 31.7% increase in provincial History Category candidates (markedly intensified competition), and the divergence in liberal arts major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from 2860; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2967, with a range of 2522–3412.
